summary: 7 film announcements, 9 TV announcements across 5 trades.

film.title: Ink
film.announcement: Netflix acquired U.S. and Latin American distribution rights to Danny Boyle's Rupert Murdoch thriller ahead of its Venice Film Festival premiere.

film.title: Renegades
film.talent: Jonathan Goldstein and John Francis Daley (directors)
film.announcement: Sony Pictures acquired the short story "Renegades" by Will Simmons and tapped Goldstein and Daley to helm the feature adaptation of the action-thriller.

film.title: The Bell Jar
film.announcement: Ella Beatty is in final talks to join Focus Features' adaptation of The Bell Jar.

film.title: Herbert West: Reanimator
film.announcement: First look released at Joseph Morgan and Katie Cassidy in the fantasy horror film adapted from H.P. Lovecraft's story.

film.title: Hollow
film.talent: Sydney Sweeney (starring), Lindsey Anderson Beer (writing and directing), LuckyChap (producing)
film.announcement: Sony landed the Sleepy Hollow package "Hollow" with Sydney Sweeney starring, Lindsey Anderson Beer writing and directing, and LuckyChap Entertainment producing.

film.title: Bender
film.talent: Bill Burr, Chris O'Dowd, Ruari Spooner
film.announcement: Harry Potter series star Ruari Spooner joined the comedy film alongside Bill Burr and Chris O'Dowd.

film.title: If I Tell You
film.announcement: Tessa Blake's film "If I Tell You" starring Carol Kane was acquired by Suncatcher Productions for distribution.

tv.title: This Summer Will Be Different
tv.announcement: Roby Attal and Francesca Reale joined Netflix's "This Summer Will Be Different" as Felix and Bridget.

tv.title: Kaet Might Die
tv.talent: Jimmi Simpson, Ben Wang, Zosia Mamet
tv.announcement: Jimmi Simpson, Ben Wang, and Zosia Mamet joined the dark comedy series created by Mercedes Bryce Morgan.

tv.title: The Drill
tv.announcement: Rowan Blanchard was cast to star in the school shooting-themed dark comedy "The Drill" from creator Millicent Hailes.

tv.title: Thunder Road
tv.announcement: West Duchovny joined AMC's NASCAR drama series "Thunder Road".

tv.title: Jakarta
tv.announcement: Iko Uwais and Albert Hughes united for the multi-generational crime series "Jakarta" at Alcon Entertainment.

tv.title: God of War
tv.announcement: Prime Video's "God of War" series will recast the lead role of Kratos after Ryan Hurst suffered an injury on set.

tv.title: Mini War
tv.talent: Brett Gelman, Kevin Nealon, Rob Morgan
tv.announcement: Brett Gelman, Kevin Nealon, and Rob Morgan joined the comedy series "Mini War".

tv.title: Queenstown
tv.announcement: Netflix unveiled "Queenstown," its first New Zealand original series.

tv.title: Ultimate Self-Defense Championship: Female-Focused Spinoff
tv.announcement: The Ultimate Self-Defense Championship launched a female-focused spinoff series on YouTube.
